CdsDocClause.description:
CDS market standard documentation clauses.

Represents the ISDA documentation clause used for CDS contracts. Different clauses
define different restructuring events and settlement procedures. Used as part of
[`CdsConventionKey`] to look up CDS conventions.

# Examples

```rust
use finstack_valuations::market::conventions::ids::CdsDocClause;

let clause = CdsDocClause::Cr14; // Cum-Restructuring 2014
```

FxConventionId.description: Identifier for FX pair market conventions (e.g., "EUR/USD", "USD/CAD").

FxOptionConventionId.description: Identifier for FX option market conventions (e.g., "EUR/USD-VANILLA").

InflationSwapConventionId.description:
Identifier for Inflation Swap market conventions (e.g., "USD-CPI", "UK-RPI").

Used to look up [`InflationSwapConventions`](crate::market::conventions::defs::InflationSwapConventions)
from the convention registry.

IrFutureContractId.description:
Stable identifier for an Interest Rate Future contract (e.g., "CME:SR3").

Used to look up [`IrFutureConventions`](crate::market::conventions::defs::IrFutureConventions)
from the convention registry.

OptionConventionId.description:
Identifier for Option market conventions (Equity/FX/Commodity).

Used to look up [`OptionConventions`](crate::market::conventions::defs::OptionConventions)
from the convention registry.

oneOf.description:
A relative tenor (e.g., 5Y, 3M).

The maturity is calculated relative to the valuation date, allowing quotes to "roll"
forward automatically. This is the standard approach for OTC instruments.

An absolute date.

The maturity is fixed to a specific date, regardless of the valuation date. This is
typically used for futures contracts or bespoke instruments with fixed maturities.

SwaptionConventionId.description:
Identifier for Swaption market conventions (e.g., "USD", "EUR").

Used to look up [`SwaptionConventions`](crate::market::conventions::defs::SwaptionConventions)
from the convention registry.

XccyConventionId.description: Identifier for cross-currency swap market conventions (e.g., "EUR/USD-XCCY").

description: Tagged union of all supported market quote types (rates, CDS, FX, vol, inflation, etc.)

oneOf.description: Fixed-rate bullet bond quoted in clean price (% of par).

clean_price_pct.description: Quoted clean price as percent of par.

coupon_rate.description: Annual coupon rate in decimal form.

currency.description: Settlement / pricing currency of the bond.

oneOf.description: Fixed-rate bullet bond quoted in Z-spread over a discount curve (decimal).

coupon_rate.description: Annual coupon rate in decimal form.

currency.description: Settlement / pricing currency of the bond.

oneOf.description: Fixed-rate bullet bond quoted in OAS (decimal).

coupon_rate.description: Annual coupon rate in decimal form.

currency.description: Settlement / pricing currency of the bond.

oneOf.description: Fixed-rate bullet bond quoted in yield-to-maturity (decimal).

coupon_rate.description: Annual coupon rate in decimal form.

currency.description: Settlement / pricing currency of the bond.

ytm.description: Yield to maturity in decimal form.

convexity_adjustment.description:
Optional convexity adjustment (rate, decimal).

This fixed value is currently required for calibration. If omitted,
futures-quote calibration will fail closed rather than silently assume
zero or attempt an unwired dynamic lookup.

vol_surface_id.description:
Optional volatility surface identifier for dynamic convexity adjustment.

Reserved for future dynamic convexity support. Until that wiring exists,
providing `vol_surface_id` without `convexity_adjustment` is treated as
an invalid quote shape during calibration.

rate.description: Fixed rate (decimal) making the swap PV=0.

spread_decimal.description:
Optional spread over the index in decimal format (e.g., 0.0010 for 10 basis points).

This spread is added to the floating leg rate. The value is in decimal format
and will be converted to basis points internally (multiplied by 10,000).

running_spread_bp.description: Running spread in basis points (e.g. 100.0 or 500.0).

upfront_pct.description: Upfront payment percentage of notional (e.g. 0.01 for 1%).
Upfront payment as a decimal fraction of tranche notional (e.g., -0.025 for -2.5%).

oneOf.description: Outright FX forward quote quoted as quote-currency per base-currency.

forward_rate.description: Forward outright quoted as quote-currency per base-currency.

pillar.description: Maturity pillar for the forward settlement date.

oneOf.description: Spot-start FX swap quote with explicit near and far outright rates.

far_pillar.description: Far-leg maturity pillar; near leg is the convention spot date.

far_rate.description: Far-leg outright rate quoted as quote-currency per base-currency.

near_rate.description: Near-leg outright rate quoted as quote-currency per base-currency.

oneOf.description: European vanilla FX option quote with explicit strike and volatility surface.

option_type.description: Call or put on the base currency.

strike.description: Strike exchange rate quoted as quote-currency per base-currency.

vol_surface_id.description: Volatility surface identifier used for pricing.

oneOf.description: Equity or commodity option implied volatility quote.
Interest rate swaption implied volatility quote.
Interest rate cap/floor implied volatility quote.
Cross-currency basis swap quoted as a spread over the quote-currency leg.

basis_spread_bp.description: Basis spread in basis points applied to the quote-currency leg.

far_pillar.description: Far-leg maturity pillar; near leg is the convention spot date.

spot_fx.description:
Optional spot FX quote (quote currency per 1 unit of base currency).

Used to derive FX-equivalent leg notionals when the build context
provides only a single standard notional.

title: Market Quote
